findings.note: The opening names the two-minute pre-meeting constraint immediately; a stressed desk worker recognizes themselves in the first shot.
The payoff delivers the promised calm reset, but the visible change between the first and last desk shot could read subtle on small screens.
findings.recommended_revision: Exaggerate the posture contrast in the final shot so the payoff is legible without sound.

findings.note: The three-move build keeps a visible progression; no dead middle.
No CTA beat is planned; the loop-back ending covers rewatch but leaves the save action implicit.
findings.recommended_revision: If nurture is the goal, add a one-line save prompt to the caption rather than the video.

reviewer_execution.fallback_reason: No bounded sub-agent runtime was available in this local session.
